summary: Validated USDC payout daemon + driver-wallet API + frontend pill/gate. 13/14 pytest pass (1 skipped – demo-login re-uses same user so cannot exercise no-wallet bucket). Frontend wallet setup page, wallet-registered-card, address display, and /driver wallet-ok pill + Go-Live (unblocked with wallet) all verified. ONE frontend gap: /vibe-ridez/driver-dashboard appears to NOT render the DriverDashboard component (body is empty, dashboard-wallet-link not present).

ui_bugs.issue: Route does not render the dashboard — body.innerText is effectively empty (only global header banner shows). As a result, the new 'Payout Wallet' button (data-testid=dashboard-wallet-link) is never visible. Route is registered in /app/frontend/src/routes/ridesRoutes.tsx line 53 wrapped in ProtectedRoute → VibeDriverDashboard. Likely a runtime error in the component or an unresolved import. Needs main-agent investigation of browser console runtime errors in DriverDashboard.tsx (Wallet icon import from lucide-react? other deps?).

action_items: Investigate why /vibe-ridez/driver-dashboard renders blank. Open DevTools console on that route — likely a React render crash in DriverDashboard.tsx (check Wallet icon import, driverData shape, or ProtectedRoute interaction). Fix so dashboard-wallet-link becomes reachable.

OPTIONAL hardening: /api/admin/usdc-payout/retry is narrow — rejects paid rows with 404 only because it filters by status. Consider returning 409 with clearer message when ride exists but is in terminal 'paid' state vs truly missing 404.

OPTIONAL: demo-login appears to deterministically re-login the same session (token refreshed to the same user_id) — this prevented the no-wallet bucket test. Consider a /api/testing/seed-driver endpoint or allow admins to seed a fresh driver for E2E.
critical_code_review_comments: usdc_payout_daemon.py _process_one: when amount exceeds daily cap, the row is flipped back to 'pending' with a driver_payout_error note — but driver_payout_attempts was ALREADY incremented by _claim_batch. Over successive ticks the attempts counter will climb even though the row never truly failed; max_attempts (3) could prematurely mark a legitimately-deferred row as failed after 3 deferrals. Suggest resetting attempts on the deferred-daily-cap branch or treat that path as a no-op.

routes/usdc_payout_admin.py admin_set_dry_run writes os.environ directly but this mutation is per-process: if backend runs with multiple workers/replicas only one sees the flip. Fine for a single-worker preview but FLAG FOR PROD — persist the flag in DB (config collection) and read on every tick() to make it durable + multi-worker safe.

Admin dry-run toggle has a doc-string promising a mainnet-ack guard that is NOT wired up. A careless operator can currently flip DRY_RUN=0 on mainnet via one POST. Before any mainnet cutover, add `if cfg['network']=='mainnet' and body.dry_run is False and not body.mainnet_ack: raise 400`.
_claim_batch does N sequential findOneAndUpdate calls — fine at batch_size=5 but won't scale. For v2, consider a bulk `update_many({status:pending, limit N}, ...)` using a claim_id or transaction.

The admin queue endpoint `/api/admin/usdc-payout/queue` has no date filter — as fare_distributions grows, the last-500 sort could miss recent rows (sorts by created_at desc, so actually ok, but flag paginating beyond 500).

success_rate.frontend: 83% (5 of 6 surfaces verified; dashboard-wallet-link not rendered)

test_credentials: Demo login via POST /api/auth/demo-login. Admin via POST /api/admin/vault-auth {password: GlobalVibez_Founder_2025!, code: 000000}.
seed_data_creation: Seeded TEST_ride_* rows via /api/viberidez/fares/distribute (15.50 USD and 1000 USD for per-tx-cap test). Registered wallet DsVmA6LJrFgVwwoMgSaU5EdX6qVnQ1qqLoL8BKf4GkqR for demo user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend surface (stats/queue/tick-now/dry-run/retry/driver-wallet POST+GET) fully covered in /app/backend/tests/test_usdc_payout.py — reuse as regression. Frontend gap is the /vibe-ridez/driver-dashboard blank render — retest after main-agent fixes it.
verified_flows: GET /api/admin/usdc-payout/stats admin-gated, returns by_status+config, NEVER exposes wallet_secret ✓
POST /api/admin/usdc-payout/dry-run live-flips env flag; verified via subsequent /stats ✓ (reset to true after)
POST /api/admin/usdc-payout/tick-now processes pending → paid with mock_sig='dryrun_...' and dry_run:true ✓
Daemon per-tx cap: $1000 fare (driver_usd=$700) lands in capped_per_tx, not paid ✓
POST /api/admin/usdc-payout/retry/{ride_id} resets capped row to pending; returns 404 on unknown ride ✓
Frontend /driver/wallet shows wallet-registered-card with correct address ✓
Frontend /driver shows driver-wallet-ok-link pill (green Wallet Connected) ✓
Frontend /driver Go Live button works (no error banner) when wallet registered ✓
